headline: UBS sees rising opportunity for analog semis in AI data center power
summary: Investing.com – Analog semiconductor makers are poised to benefit from the rapid buildout of artificial intelligence data centers, as the growing power demands of advanced computing infrastructure drive higher demand for chips that manage and regulate electricity, according to UBS.

content.title: UBS sees rising opportunity for analog semis in AI data center power
